default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps for optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic approaching 1,000 visitors/week (800 new content, 50 refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Demo submissions from blog content doubled in Q3, matching Q2 numbers in just 3 weeks of Q4](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Content strategy evolving: need to balance SEO-driven posts with featured company content](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Plans to implement user identification tools (e.g., Koala) and optimize blog layout in Q1 2025](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Approaching 1,000 weekly blog visitors (142 published articles)](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Keyword research based on competitor analysis, paid ad keywords, and "land and expand" strategy](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Content prioritization balances product-tied articles (\~100) with top-of-funnel keywords (\~42)](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Significant increase in demo submissions from blog content (Q2: 9, Q3: 17, Q4 to date: 11)](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

### SEO and Domain Authority

  - [Swoogo experiencing steeper domain authority increase than typical for similar timeframes](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Increased "optimizable and sellable surface area" for future conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Expectation of lift in brand searches over next 6-12 months due to consistent content quality](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

### Blog Optimization and User Experience

  - [Current blog posts not featured on homepage to avoid overshadowing company news](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Need for a cohesive blog strategy balancing SEO content with promotional material](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Consideration of content hubs to organize different content initiatives (e.g., blog, directory, forms)](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Potential for stronger CTAs and lead magnets to improve conversion rates (currently \~0.04%)](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### Content Collaboration and Workflow

  - [Rebecca (new Director of Branding Content) to review existing blogs and suggest new topics](https://fathom.video/share/M3AoNmx2RrQj7PraSgmz2gT8owyBvTNr?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
